title: Add File from Link in WorkForm

posts.author: Josiah711 (Josiah Stendel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Currently, you can add files from links in the column/table view, but not when using the same field in a WorkForm.

That means, currently there’s no way to add multiple files from links in a WorkForm.

  • You could add a link field, but then you can only attach a single file.
  • You could make a text box, but links added there aren’t hyperlinked and the formatting can be messy when you need to retrieve the links
  • You can’t have the links in a doc, because those Monday Docs are also not supported in WorkForms yet
